title: chamaecrista repens
intro: Chamaecrista repens, also known as the sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a type of annual or perennial legume native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chamaecrista repens include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Chamaecrista repens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used as a raw herb in traditional medicine practices.
